revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required before production: (1) SCHEMA MISUSE — cherry_pick_moments[2] (01:17): remove the setter_scope_discipline reference; replace with explicit acknowledgment that no duplicate-lead protocol exists in the schema and flag this as a floor-level process gap for Kenny to define. (2) SCHEMA MISUSE — cherry_pick_moments[3] (01:33): demote protocols.how_did_you_get_my_number from primary to removed; promote coaching_philosophy.empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure as the sole primary reference, with a note that the TBD data_mining_concern rebuttal is the closest schema analog. (3) MULTI_TOUCH_PATTERNS — remove the 00:49 door-knock mention as an 'Ion-as-intrusion' signal; the transcript does not support Patricia framing the door-knock as unwanted contact. The intrusion pattern should be scoped to the 01:33 lead-farm disclosure only, and the pattern label should be revised accordingly. Optional but recommended: add a cherry_pick entry for the missed verify.prior_designs gap (Patricia mentions comparing to another company but Ty never asks which one or what design she saw).
